If the driving distance ξ does not exceed 4km, the fare is fixed at 10 yuan. If the driving distance exceeds 4km, the fare is calculated as 10 yuan plus 2 yuan per kilometer exceeding 4km, with fractions of a kilometer rounded up to the nearest kilometer. This means that for any distance greater than 4km, the fare is calculated as 10 + 2 * ceil(ξ - 4).
